exemplar.title: How might the context in which knowledge is presented influence whether it is accepted or rejected?

detailedExemplarData.title: How might the context in which knowledge is presented influence whether it is accepted or rejected?

strengths: Clear identification of three distinct objects with specific real-world contexts (Monet painting, Croatian ring, family espresso machine).
Effective framing by including the IA prompt as a section header, which establishes the focus on context shaping knowledge acceptance.
Well-formatted bibliography for the Monet painting and precise labeling of the espresso machine, demonstrating good sourcing practices.
weaknesses: Links between each object and the TOK prompt are uneven and often remain at a narrative level rather than analytical.
Justification for inclusion of the ring and coffee-machine relies heavily on personal anecdote and vendor comment, lacking authoritative evidence.
Discussion drifts from the prompt in places (e.g., generic art history of Impressionism) and lacks synthesis across the three objects.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs work aligns most closely with the 3â4 band descriptors: three objects are clearly presented with some real-world context, and there is an attempt to explain links to the prompt. However, the analysis remains superficial and uneven, with limited reference to wider evidence or TOK concepts beyond personal narrative. While strengths such as clear object identification and academic sourcing for the painting are evident, the lack of depth and consistent analytical rigor constrain the exhibition to the top of the 3â4 band. Therefore, a final score of 4 accurately reflects the quality of the submission.

annotations.comment: Ensure all objects have at least one academic or authoritative reference to support the TOK claims regarding context and acceptance.
The inclusion of the IA prompt as a SectionHeader provides clear framing for the exhibitionâs exploration of context and knowledge.
The object is clearly identified with title and creator, which successfully establishes the first exhibitâs real-world context.
While the caption cites source and date, it lacks deeper historical evidence showing why Salon rejection shaped knowledge acceptance.
The descriptive paragraph vividly conveys personal admiration but does not yet link explicitly to how context influenced the paintingâs acceptance or rejection.
Consider adding specific details of the 1874 Salon des RefusÃ©s to strengthen the link between institutional context and the paintingâs reception.
The summary of Paris Salon criticism is informative, yet the connection to the prompt remains narrative rather than analytical.
Good historical context is provided in the footnote, which could be integrated into the main analysis to support your TOK claims.
The paragraph on post-impressionist movements is accurate but drifts from the prompt; refocus this on acceptance criteria for new art knowledge.
The inline math symbol appears misplaced in a TOK exhibition; verify whether this is OCR artifact and remove if irrelevant.
The ring object is clearly identified with location and date, which effectively establishes its specific real-world context.
The vendorâs explanation is cited but lacks critical evaluation; consider adding historical references on Trogirâs patron saints.
The connection between ring aesthetics and the acceptance of Croatian historical knowledge is asserted but needs specific evidence or references.
The abrupt sentence ending suggests missing text; clarify the final thought to complete your argument.
The follow-up contextual paragraph offers good cultural background but remains narrative; integrate TOK concepts like âauthority of knowledgeâ.
The ring section lacks explicit reference back to the prompt; add signposting such as âThis example shows how context shapes acceptance...â.
The coffee machine object is precisely labeled with make, model, and purchase details, demonstrating strong contextual grounding.
The image of the machine is helpful but would benefit from contextual caption explaining Polish coffee-drinking norms as shared knowledge.
The technical description of the espresso machine is clear, showing strong real-world contextualization.
The discussion of parental rules is personal but needs discussion of how cultural beliefs form part of shared knowledge frameworks.
Explicitly analyze how the prohibition shaped your epistemic beliefs about coffee; this will tie personal narrative to the TOK prompt.
Consider adding a concluding paragraph that synthesizes how all three objects collectively demonstrate the role of context in knowledge acceptance.
Bibliography entries for the painting are reliable and well-formatted, demonstrating good academic sourcing.
Citation styles vary across sources; harmonize formatting (e.g., author-date vs. retrieved dates) for greater consistency.
Add a citation for the vendorâs information about the ringâs mythology and for manufacturer details of the coffee machine.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
